queries.question: List all customers with their account numbers and loan rate of interest with account fees.
queries.sql:
SELECT
Accounts.AccountNumber,
Customers.fullName,
Loans.RateOfInterest,
Fees.TransactionFee
FROM Accounts
JOIN Customers ON Customers.CustomerID = Accounts.CustomerID
JOIN Loans ON Loans.AccountNumber = Accounts.AccountNumber
JOIN Fees ON Fees.AccountNumber = Accounts.AccountNumber
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?accountnumber ?fullname ?rateofinterest ?transactionfee WHERE {
  ?accounts a :Accounts .
  ?customers a :Customers .
  ?accounts p:hasCustomers ?customers .
  ?loans a :Loans .
  ?loans p:hasAccounts ?accounts .
  ?fees a :Fees .
  ?fees p:hasAccounts ?accounts .
  ?accounts p:AccountNumber ?accountnumber .
  ?customers p:name ?fullname .
  ?loans p:RateOfInterest ?rateofinterest .
  ?fees p:TransactionFee ?transactionfee .
}

queries.question: List all customers with their account numbers and loan rate of interest with account fees.
queries.sql:
SELECT
Accounts.AccountNumber,
Customers.fullName,
Loans.RateOfInterest,
Fees.TransactionFee, Fees.MaintenanceFee
FROM Accounts
JOIN Customers ON Customers.CustomerID = Accounts.CustomerID
JOIN Loans ON Loans.AccountNumber = Accounts.AccountNumber
JOIN Fees ON Fees.AccountNumber = Accounts.AccountNumber

PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?accountnumber ?fullname ?rateofinterest ?transactionfee ?maintenancefee WHERE {
  ?accounts a :Accounts .
  ?customers a :Customers .
  ?accounts p:hasCustomers ?customers .
  ?loans a :Loans .
  ?loans p:hasAccounts ?accounts .
  ?fees a :Fees .
  ?fees p:hasAccounts ?accounts .
  ?accounts p:AccountNumber ?accountnumber .
  ?customers p:name ?fullname .
  ?loans p:RateOfInterest ?rateofinterest .
  ?fees p:TransactionFee ?transactionfee .
  ?fees p:MaintenanceFee ?maintenancefee .
}

queries.question: List customers, along with their account number, maintenance fee and overdraft limits.
queries.sql:
SELECT
Accounts.AccountNumber,
Customers.fullName, 
Fees.MaintenanceFee, 
Overdrafts.LimitAmount
FROM Accounts
JOIN Customers ON Accounts.CustomerID = Customers.CustomerID
JOIN Fees ON Fees.AccountNumber = Accounts.AccountNumber
JOIN Overdrafts ON Overdrafts.AccountNumber = Accounts.AccountNumber
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?accountnumber ?fullname ?maintenancefee ?limitamount WHERE {
  ?accounts a :Accounts .
  ?customers a :Customers .
  ?accounts p:hasCustomers ?customers .
  ?fees a :Fees .
  ?fees p:hasAccounts ?accounts .
  ?overdrafts a :Overdrafts .
  ?overdrafts p:hasAccounts ?accounts .
  ?accounts p:AccountNumber ?accountnumber .
  ?customers p:name ?fullname .
  ?fees p:MaintenanceFee ?maintenancefee .
  ?overdrafts p:LimitAmount ?limitamount .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show a list of the customers along with their account number, fees and overdraft limits.
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE vague {
  component: { SELECT ?accountnumber ?fullname ?maintenancefee ?limitamount WHERE {
  ?accounts a :Accounts .
  ?customers a :Customers .
  ?accounts p:hasCustomers ?customers .
  ?fees a :Fees .
  ?fees p:hasAccounts ?accounts .
  ?overdrafts a :Overdrafts .
  ?overdrafts p:hasAccounts ?accounts .
  ?accounts p:AccountNumber ?accountnumber .
  ?customers p:name ?fullname .
  ?fees p:MaintenanceFee ?maintenancefee .
  ?overdrafts p:LimitAmount ?limitamount .
} }
  component_2: { SELECT ?accountnumber ?fullname ?transactionfee ?limitamount WHERE {
  ?accounts a :Accounts .
  ?customers a :Customers .
  ?accounts p:hasCustomers ?customers .
  ?fees a :Fees .
  ?fees p:hasAccounts ?accounts .
  ?overdrafts a :Overdrafts .
  ?overdrafts p:hasAccounts ?accounts .
  ?accounts p:AccountNumber ?accountnumber .
  ?customers p:name ?fullname .
  ?fees p:TransactionFee ?transactionfee .
  ?overdrafts p:LimitAmount ?limitamount .
} }
  full: { SELECT ?accountnumber ?fullname ?transactionfee ?maintenancefee ?limitamount WHERE {
  ?accounts a :Accounts .
  ?customers a :Customers .
  ?accounts p:hasCustomers ?customers .
  ?fees a :Fees .
  ?fees p:hasAccounts ?accounts .
  ?overdrafts a :Overdrafts .
  ?overdrafts p:hasAccounts ?accounts .
  ?accounts p:AccountNumber ?accountnumber .
  ?customers p:name ?fullname .
  ?fees p:TransactionFee ?transactionfee .
  ?fees p:MaintenanceFee ?maintenancefee .
  ?overdrafts p:LimitAmount ?limitamount .
} }
}
